summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-1 (logo-click admin login flow in Navigation and Footer), REQ-2 (full AdminPanel with image uploads, text editing, artwork CRUD), and REQ-3 (corrected Instagram URL). Most acceptance criteria are satisfied. One minor gap: the non-admin access-denied message behavior after login is partially handled — Footer and Navigation redirect unconditionally to /admin after login without checking isAdmin first, deferring the access-denied experience entirely to the AdminPanel page.

missing_requirements.requirement: Non-admin users clicking the logo are prompted to authenticate but see an access-denied message if not admin
missing_requirements.reason: In Footer.tsx and Navigation.tsx, after a successful login the code unconditionally does window.location.href = '/admin' without checking isAdmin. The access-denied experience depends entirely on the AdminPanel page guard rather than being surfaced at the logo-click level as specified in the AC.

hallucinated_features.description: ArtworkGallery component added to the public-facing portfolio page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding an ArtworkGallery section to the public portfolio page. The frontend-file-summaries.txt describes a new ArtworkGallery component rendered in App.tsx between FeaturedProjects and ContactSection, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module added for backend state migration
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a migration system. A new backend/migration.mo file was added to handle state schema upgrades, which was not part of any requirement.
